bits.premise: Being named Michael Keaton is embarrassing when his walk makes him resemble a Batman villain instead of Batman.
His body makes people assume his politics because he physically leans.
Calling himself a homeowner is technically true because he lives in his Toyota RAV4.
Getting older has made cough drops feel like candy.
Aging has turned masturbation from desire into a prostate health chore.

lines.text: You know how embarrassing it is to be named after a Batman
lines.label: setup

lines.text: and having a hobble out here like the penguin?
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Oh, man, it's...
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: Like, it's an interesting life.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Like, so many people, like, they assume
lines.label: setup

lines.text: that they don't know what my politics are gonna be.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Just, like, look at this guy.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: It's like, he has to lean, right?
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Oh, man.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: You guys are fun.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: Oh.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: I became a homeowner recently.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Yeah, yeah, thank you, thank you.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: It's a RAV4.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Oh, man.
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: I live in it, so it's more of a RAV4, okay?
lines.label: tag

lines.text: Oh, I'm getting older in my life.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Like, you know, I've gotten to the point--
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I think, like, my favorite candy now or cough drops,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: you know?
lines.label: fluff

lines.text: They're just menthol flavored Jolly Ranchers, you know?
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: I've hit the point in my life where it's like,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I'm pretty sure the only reason I masturbate
lines.label: setup

lines.text: is for prostate health, you know?
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Like, my partner walks in on me and is like,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: "What are you thinking about?
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I'm just sitting there like, can't through."
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: All right, thank you.
lines.label: fluff
